g.desc: fy = 210 Mpa Cross-section can be modelled as as thin-walled ...
g.text: fy = 210 MpaCross-section can be modelled as as thin-walledAll loads are applied at in the normal force- and shear force centre---Doorsnede kan als dunwandig worden beschouwdAlle krachten grijpen aan in het normaalkrachten- en dwarskrachtencentrum
